chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Age at Which Children Are Required to Observe Fasting

text: 1905 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَمَاعَةُ : عَنِ اَلصَّبِيِّ مَتَى يَصُومُ قَالَ «إِذَا قَوِيَ عَلَى اَلصِّيَامِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1905 - Sama'ah asked Imam (as) about when a child should begin fasting.
Imam (as) said: "When he is strong enough to fast."
